title: Seek in the Dark: Reasoning via Test-Time Instance-Level Policy Gradient in Latent Space

methodology.key_feature: Iterative updates to latent representations without parameter updating

findings.efficiency: Highly efficient, typically converging within a few iterations for average complexity problems
findings.characteristics: Lightweight, scalable, and effective solution for enhancing LLM reasoning

limitations.potential_issue: Output may be incoherent and semantically ungrounded (mentioned in §3.6)
